jokes.text: And I have to say that the way that you're rockin' those slacks is quite impressive as well.
jokes.punchline: Leslie inappropriately compliments Ben's appearance in front of Ron
jokes.explanation: Classic Leslie inappropriateness - perfectly in character and sets up the professional/personal boundary issues that drive the episode

jokes.text: Can we hurry this up, please?
jokes.setup: Leslie and Ben being inappropriate in meeting
jokes.punchline: Ron's deadpan reaction to their workplace flirtation
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ron response - economical and character-specific

jokes.text: We rehearsed that at home. Naked in bed.
jokes.setup: Leslie and Ben finishing each other's sentences cutely
jokes.punchline: TMI revelation about where they practiced
jokes.explanation: Great escalation from cute to uncomfortable - classic Leslie oversharing

jokes.text: What! What!
jokes.punchline: Both Leslie and Ben's shocked reactions to her overshare
jokes.explanation: Good reaction beat that sells the cringe moment

jokes.text: Stamp the damn form.
jokes.setup: More workplace flirtation from Leslie and Ben
jokes.punchline: Ron's increasingly frustrated demand
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ron escalation - still deadpan but more forceful

jokes.text: I think our love made him angry. I think he broke my wrist. I'm not kidding.
jokes.punchline: Ron's violent rejection of affection causes actual injury
jokes.explanation: Great physical comedy escalation - very Ron to accidentally injure someone avoiding affection

jokes.text: Except that I'm a whale and that my feet already kill. Whales don't have feet. I am a crazy shape.
jokes.punchline: Ann's illogical whale metaphor and Chris's literal correction
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist pregnancy humor with Chris's literal response

jokes.text: This morning when I got out of bed, I just tipped forward like a poorly made bowling pin.
jokes.punchline: Specific visual comparison to defective bowling pin
jokes.explanation: Excellent specific visual metaphor - 'poorly made bowling pin' is a perfect comedic detail

jokes.text: I read something on raddadsolutions.net that there's a pressure point in the foot that could induce labor.
jokes.setup: Chris offering to rub Ann's feet
jokes.punchline: His over-researched fear about pressure points
jokes.explanation: Perfect Chris character moment - overthinking helpful gesture with pseudo-scientific website

jokes.text: Everything is amazing. Today is perfect, and I love you. [cut to] He's driving me up the fucking wall.
jokes.setup: Ann's talking head saying everything is perfect
jokes.punchline: Immediate cut to her true feelings
jokes.explanation: Excellent mockumentary structure - perfect misdirection with immediate payoff

jokes.text: Look at this tiny tree. Can you eat this? Aww. This one's dead.
jokes.punchline: Her childlike confusion about plants escalating to finding a dead one
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Leslie's enthusiasm despite ignorance

jokes.text: Green cabbage is always a safe bet. Red cabbage is good. I mean, you can't go wrong. That's the fun thing about cabbage. One of the fun things.
jokes.punchline: Connie's overly enthusiastic but mundane cabbage sales pitch
jokes.explanation: Good character work - perfectly captures boring vendor enthusiasm

jokes.text: Chardbodies: Get a chard on. Let's get 're-charded' in here!
jokes.punchline: Terrible chard-based puns
jokes.explanation: Absurd concept with intentionally bad puns - works because it's so ridiculous

jokes.text: Let's get 're-charded' in here!
jokes.punchline: Another chard pun with 'retarded' implication
jokes.explanation: Weaker pun that relies on offensive word substitution rather than clever wordplay

jokes.text: By 'rules of conduct,' do you mean that wooden sign you made that says, 'Peas be kind to others'?
jokes.punchline: Ben revealing Leslie's vegetable pun signs
jokes.explanation: Perfect Leslie character moment - of course she made vegetable pun signs

jokes.text: Yes, and 'In case of fire, romaine calm,' and 'You won't bay leaf how nice olive our vendors are.'
jokes.punchline: Leslie proudly listing more terrible vegetable puns
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of Leslie's pun obsession - very in character

jokes.text: I don't like vegetables, but I'm very good at vegetable puns.
jokes.punchline: She admits she doesn't even like vegetables
jokes.explanation: Excellent character insight - perfectly Leslie to excel at puns about things she doesn't like

jokes.text: No, that's a super small piano.
jokes.setup: April asking if Andy plays guitar
jokes.punchline: Andy's completely serious wrong answer
jokes.explanation: Perfect Andy logic - completely wrong but delivered with total confidence

jokes.text: $75,000? How about 300? $300,000? 150. They'll do it.
jokes.punchline: Andy's ridiculous price expectations and April settling low
jokes.explanation: Good character work showing Andy's delusions and April's pragmatism

jokes.text: 150 bucks? Split that four ways, boom. $600.
jokes.punchline: Andy's impossible math
jokes.explanation: Classic Andy math error - perfectly in character

jokes.text: I can't wash my face with hand soap. Look at these pores. They're gaping.
jokes.setup: Tom complaining at whine and cheese club
jokes.punchline: His vanity about facial pores
jokes.explanation: Perfect Tom vanity - completely in character

jokes.text: It's the whine & cheese club, gorgeous.
jokes.punchline: Tom's wordplay on 'wine and cheese'
jokes.explanation: Good pun that actually describes the activity perfectly

jokes.text: The rules do not specify whether or not I'm allowed to listen to Willie Nelson on my headphones.
jokes.punchline: His loophole for ignoring employees
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ron - finding technical loophole to avoid human interaction

jokes.text: ♪ Hello, walls ♪ Hello ♪ Hello ♪ How'd things go for you today? ♪
jokes.setup: Ron explaining he's allowed to listen to Willie Nelson during HR meetings
jokes.punchline: Actually singing along to the music while trying to work
jokes.explanation: Great Ron moment - finding loophole to ignore employees while enjoying country music

jokes.text: I want to be Pac-Man, and instead of dots, I want 'em to be cinnamon buns. I want to be a giant head and a mouth, and I just want to eat rows and rows of junk food pellets
jokes.punchline: Increasingly elaborate Pac-Man fantasy
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation - Pac-Man metaphor is both absurd and relatable

jokes.text: The reason is it's vegetable porn. Porn on the cob.
jokes.setup: Ben saying there's no reason to kick out chard vendors
jokes.punchline: Leslie's escalating descriptions including corn pun
jokes.explanation: Good pun escalation showing Leslie's ability to pun even in arguments

jokes.text: I'm sorry. I'm just very good at that.
jokes.punchline: Referencing her earlier admission about being good at vegetable puns
jokes.explanation: Nice callback showing Leslie's self-awareness about her pun addiction

jokes.text: No, it's ridiculous to think that you could survive a nuclear blast by jumping into a refrigerator.
jokes.punchline: Ben's logical critique of movie physics
jokes.explanation: Good Ben character moment - overthinking movie logic

jokes.text: We pulled into the parking lot, and this is technically city hall property, so now we're at work-- let's do this.
jokes.setup: Ben trying to maintain firewall between home and work
jokes.punchline: Leslie finding loophole in parking lot
jokes.explanation: Perfect Leslie - finding technical loophole to get what she wants

jokes.text: Leslie's toffee surprise. The surprise is there's toffee in the inside.
jokes.punchline: Anticlimactic explanation of 'surprise'
jokes.explanation: Great anti-joke - perfectly Leslie to overthink simple naming

jokes.text: My stomach has so many stretch marks on it that it looks like an old-fashioned globe.
jokes.punchline: Specific visual comparison to vintage globe
jokes.explanation: Excellent specific visual metaphor - old-fashioned globe is perfect detail

jokes.text: Also, I just read Brooke Shields' book on post-partum depression. Now I have pre-post-partum depression anxiety.
jokes.punchline: Creating new psychological condition by reading about future problems
jokes.explanation: Clever concept of getting anxiety about future depression - perfectly captures over-preparation anxiety

jokes.text: It's from Kernsten's-- the nipple people. It has nipple cream, nipple pads, and also a special nipple pimple ointment in case you develop any pimples on your nipples.
jokes.punchline: Excessive use of word 'nipple' and nipple pimple alliteration
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment with Chris's over-helpful nature

jokes.text: boob hats.
jokes.punchline: His ridiculous euphemism
jokes.explanation: Brilliant euphemism - 'boob hats' is absurd but somehow makes sense

jokes.text: Sex is cool. I say we finish on Drunk Off Our Asses. And I think we should do Sex in Space.
jokes.setup: Planning setlist for what Andy thinks is adult venue
jokes.punchline: Inappropriate song titles for kids' party
jokes.explanation: Good setup for the kids' party reveal disaster

jokes.text: Dave Grohl might be there. I don't know. He might be anywhere. The guy's awesome, and he's unpredictable.
jokes.punchline: His ridiculous justification for the lie
jokes.explanation: Good Andy logic - technically not lying since Dave Grohl could be anywhere

jokes.text: Dave Grohl might be there. I don't know. He might be anywhere. The guy's awesome, and he's unpredictable.
jokes.setup: Andy trying to justify the kids' party gig
jokes.punchline: Ridiculous logic that Dave Grohl could randomly appear
jokes.explanation: Perfect Andy logic - optimistic and completely illogical

jokes.text: Umbilical school?
jokes.setup: Rivers saying he's going back to rabbinical school
jokes.punchline: Andy's mishearing
jokes.explanation: Good Andy mistake - mishearing in character way

jokes.text: It's like, 'Hey, you like lettuce? Try this. It's worse. It tastes like kale took a dump on spinach.'
jokes.punchline: Vivid description of chard's taste
jokes.explanation: Excellent descriptive comedy - perfectly captures chard's taste issue

jokes.text: I like to think of it as celery with B.O.
jokes.punchline: Ben's equally vivid comparison
jokes.explanation: Good follow-up joke - concise and vivid

jokes.text: I like to think of it as celery with B.O.
jokes.setup: Nolan's gross description of chard taste
jokes.punchline: Leslie adding her own disgusting but apt metaphor
jokes.explanation: Great addition to the chard roast - concise and creates vivid unappetizing image

jokes.text: This is a Cuban. This is yellowtail. I feel amazing.
jokes.setup: Ann complaining about being kicked out of club
jokes.punchline: Ron's complete indifference while enjoying luxuries
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ron - enjoying himself while completely ignoring drama

jokes.text: Stay frosty, Wyatt.
jokes.punchline: Leslie's random action movie reference
jokes.explanation: Minor character moment - Leslie's random pop culture references

jokes.text: Ha-ha! Bank! Private property. Firewall restored! Ha-ha-ha!
jokes.setup: Leslie and Ben chasing each other around town with firewall rules
jokes.punchline: Ben's triumphant escape to private property
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of their property chase game with Ben's nerdy celebration

jokes.text: You can't escape city hall, fool! Let's dance.
jokes.punchline: Leslie's dramatic challenge
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the absurd chase sequence

jokes.text: Why are you yelling? Tom put all my records into this rectangle!
jokes.setup: Donna asking why Ron is yelling
jokes.punchline: Ron's amazement at iPod technology
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ron technology confusion - 'rectangle' is hilariously literal

jokes.text: The songs just play one right after the other! This is an excellent rectangle!
jokes.punchline: His continued amazement and 'rectangle' terminology
jokes.explanation: Good callback and escalation of Ron's tech amazement

jokes.text: I feel like I'm arguing with the sun.
jokes.setup: Ben explaining why he doesn't argue with Leslie
jokes.punchline: Poetic comparison of Leslie to the sun
jokes.explanation: Excellent metaphor - perfectly captures Leslie's overwhelming passion and Ben's feelings about it

jokes.text: What? That is totally crazy! I am super chill all the time!
jokes.setup: Ben saying Leslie is passionate like the sun
jokes.punchline: Leslie's agitated denial while proving his point
jokes.explanation: Perfect ironic moment - Leslie immediately proving Ben's point

jokes.text: This is 'un-charded' territory for us.
jokes.setup: Ben describing their unusual work situation
jokes.punchline: Chard pun in serious moment
jokes.explanation: Good callback that shows Ben learning Leslie's pun skills

jokes.text: Oh, it's sex! Oh, crap. Now what the hell am I supposed to sing?
jokes.setup: Andy trying to make songs kid-appropriate
jokes.punchline: Finally realizing the actual problem
jokes.explanation: Good payoff to Andy's earlier confusion about inappropriate lyrics

jokes.text: Please welcome Johnny Karate and his magical guitar stick!
jokes.punchline: Making up name and calling guitar a 'stick'
jokes.explanation: Good improvised introduction - 'magical guitar stick' is absurd

jokes.text: Pick your nose / 'Cause boogers are gross / Clean out your snout
jokes.punchline: Gross but harmless lyrics kids would love
jokes.explanation: Good character moment - Andy finding his niche with kid humor

jokes.text: I for instance peed the bed until I was 32
jokes.setup: Andy singing about bed-wetting to kids
jokes.punchline: TMI about his own extended bed-wetting
jokes.explanation: Perfect Andy overshare - completely inappropriate but delivered innocently

jokes.text: There's just been, like, a long, slow fart stream coming out of me since we started talking... this morning.
jokes.setup: Ann complaining about gas to Chris
jokes.punchline: Overly detailed description with awkward timing
jokes.explanation: Good gross-out pregnancy humor with awkward detail

jokes.text: Well, if this is the way people want to buy their produce, so be it. This town is full of lunatics.
jokes.setup: Sexy farmers market after dark opening
jokes.punchline: Ben's resigned acceptance of Pawnee's weirdness
jokes.explanation: Good Ben reaction - perfectly captures his relationship with Pawnee's absurdity

jokes.text: Yeah, it's like a tree barfed in my mouth.
jokes.setup: Leslie and Ben trying chard after all the discussion
jokes.punchline: Leslie's vivid description confirming how terrible it tastes
jokes.explanation: Good payoff confirming all the earlier complaints about chard's taste were justified

jokes.text: Yeah, it's like a tree barfed in my mouth.
jokes.punchline: Vivid description of chard's taste
jokes.explanation: Good callback to earlier chard complaints with vivid imagery
